message:
test(bakeoff): Add integration tests for evaluation harness

Add comprehensive integration tests using mock embedders:
- MockEmbedder: deterministic hash-based embeddings
- QualityMockEmbedder: keyword-aware feature embeddings
- Tests for harness evaluation, comparison, table formatting
- Tests for edge cases (empty corpus, custom config, eligibility)

8 integration tests covering the complete harness workflow.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-3n54

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
